ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the artwork */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the artwork */,
  "creation_year" INTEGER /* Year the artwork was created */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium used in the artwork (e.g., ink on paper) */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the artwork (e.g., support dimensions) */,
  "acquisition_year" INTEGER /* Year the artwork was acquired by the museum */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the artwork */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the artwork */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series or thematic collection the artwork belongs to */,
  "provenance" TEXT /* Brief history of the artwork's ownership and provenance */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the artwork (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the artwork */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords or tags for easy filtering and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES artwork_series ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the artist */,
  "year_of_birth" INTEGER /* Year the artist was born */,
  "year_of_death" INTEGER /* Year the artist died */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place where the artist was born */,
  "place_of_death" TEXT /* Place where the artist died */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Detailed biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "education" TEXT /* Information about the artist's education and training */,
  "influences" TEXT /* Artists or movements that influenced the artist */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards and recognitions received by the artist */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the artist or their estate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the exhibition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exhibition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exhibition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exhibition */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the curator responsible for the exhibition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the exhibition */,
  "catalog_url" TEXT /* URL to the exhibition catalog or brochure */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of visitors to the exhibition */,
  "press_coverage" TEXT /* Summary of press coverage and media attention */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors for the exhibition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES curators ("curator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "acquisitions" (
  "acquisition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each acquisition record */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork that was acquired */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the artwork was acquired */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source from which the artwork was acquired */,
  "price" REAL /* Price paid for the artwork */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* The invoice number for the acquisition */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the donor if the artwork was donated */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the acquisition (e.g., purchased, gifted, loaned) */,
  "condition_at_acquisition" TEXT /* Condition of the artwork at the time of acquisition */,
  "appraised_value" REAL /* Appraised value of the artwork at the time of acquisition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("acquisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisitions_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_acquisitions_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the series */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the series began */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the series ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, researcher, public) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibition_artworks" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exhibition */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artwork */,
  "exhibition_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the artwork was displayed in the exhibition */,
  "display_location" TEXT /* Location within the exhibition where the artwork was displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id", "artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curators" (
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the curator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the curator */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the curator */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the curator */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the curator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curator_id")
)
